author: James M.
review: Best car buying experience I've ever had. The team at SQ Motors went above and beyond to find me the exact Hellcat I was looking for. No pressure, honest pricing, and they even helped me secure great financing. Highly recommend!

author: Sarah T.
review: I drove 3 hours to visit SQ Motors and it was absolutely worth it. The inventory was impressive and the staff knew their stuff. Got a fair price on my Mustang and the whole process took less than 2 hours.

author: Mike R.
review: Transparent, professional, and no hidden fees. They showed me the carfax upfront and were honest about the vehicle history. The warranty options they offered gave me real peace of mind. Will definitely be back for my next ride.

author: Jennifer L.
review: As a first-time buyer, I was nervous about the process. The team at SQ Motors made everything simple and explained every step. They found me a Charger in perfect condition within my budget. Couldn't be happier!

author: David K.
review: Finally found a Mach 1 that wasn't marked up to the moon. SQ Motors has fair prices and a no-nonsense approach. The car was exactly as described. Five stars across the board.

author: Amanda S.
review: I've bought from big dealerships before and hated the experience. SQ Motors is different—smaller, personal, and they actually listen to what you want. Got a beautiful Challenger and felt respected throughout.

author: Robert H.
review: Dream car achieved! SQ Motors had the Corvette I'd been hunting for months. The team was knowledgeable about the car's specs and history. Financing was smooth. These folks know performance cars.

author: Emily W.
review: Great selection of muscle cars at honest prices. I was on a tighter budget and they found me a well-maintained Ecoboost that runs like a dream. No pushy sales tactics—just genuine help. Thank you!

author: Chris B.
review: Needed something that could fit the family but still had some power. The Durango SRT was the perfect fit. SQ Motors made the trade-in process painless and the numbers worked out great. Family approved!

author: Lisa P.
review: Third car I've bought from SQ Motors over the years. That should tell you something. Consistently fair, consistently professional. They've earned my loyalty and I'll keep coming back.

author: Kevin D.
review: Snagged a Dark Horse before they disappeared from the market. SQ Motors had it at a reasonable price when everyone else was gouging. The whole team understood what I was looking for. Top-notch experience.

author: Michelle A.
review: Didn't think I could afford a Challenger, but SQ Motors worked with me on financing and found options I didn't know existed. Now I'm cruising in style. They really do want to put people in cars they love.

author: Jason L.
review: Came for a muscle car, left with a Raptor. The team helped me realize what would actually fit my needs—towing, hauling, and some weekend fun. No pressure, just good advice. The Raptor is a beast!

author: Nicole F.
review: Moved to Springfield and needed a reliable car fast. SQ Motors had several options ready to go. Picked up a clean Charger in one afternoon. Friendly folks, clean facility, no drama. Exactly what I needed.

author: Brian T.
review: The Scat Pack 392 is an absolute monster. SQ Motors had the exact color and options I wanted. Test drive was thorough, paperwork was quick. If you're in the market for American muscle, start here.
